title: EEG: RL Task (3-Armed Bandit) with alcohol cues in hazardous drinkers and ctls
description: This dataset comprises electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from 53 community participants performing a three-armed bandit reinforcement learning task with alcohol and beverage cues. The study investigates electrophysiological markers of decision-making and cue-specific exploration in hazardous drinkers compared to controls. Participants viewed either alcohol-related or neutral beverage cues during the task. Data were collected between 2019 and 2021 at the University of New Mexico's Cognitive Research and Clinical Laboratory.

funding_references.funder_name: National Institute on Alcohol Abuse and Alcoholism
